mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql001 */ SEQ_SELF_CHECK.nextval AS NEXT_SELF_CHECK_ID FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql002 */ INTO COR_SELF_CHECK ( COR_SELF_CHECK_ID, COR_ENFORCE_DATE, COR_BROKER_CODE, COR_MEMO, COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE, COR_CREATE_DATE, COR_CREATE_BY, COR_UPDATE_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY ) VALUES ( #{req.nextSelfCheckId}, #{req.registerDate}, #{req.brokerCode}, NULL, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId} )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql003 */ INTO COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION ( COR_SELF_CHECK_ID, COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID, COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG, COR_CREATE_DATE, COR_CREATE_BY, COR_UPDATE_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY, COR_ANSWER_REASON, COR_ANSWER_COUNT, COR_ANSWER_RESULT ) VALUES ( #{req.nextSelfCheckId}, #{req.selfCheckItemId}, #{req.confirmation}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, #{req.answerReason}, #{req.answerCount}, #{req.answerResult} )
mapper.update: MERGE /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql004 */ INTO COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION B USING ( SELECT A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID, #{req.answerReason} AS COR_ANSWER_REASON, #{req.answerCount} AS COR_ANSWER_COUNT, #{req.userId} AS COR_UPDATE_BY FROM COR_SELF_CHECK A WHERE A.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{req.registerDate} AND A.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} ) data ON ( B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID = data.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID AND B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID = #{req.selfCheckItemId} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET B.COR_ANSWER_REASON = data.COR_ANSWER_REASON, B.COR_ANSWER_COUNT = data.COR_ANSWER_COUNT, B.COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, B.COR_UPDATE_BY = data.COR_UPDATE_BY
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql005 */ VAR_VALUE FROM TB_MED_SYSTEM_VARIABLE WHERE VAR_NAME = #{req.varName}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-02#Sql006 */ (A.ITEMS - B.READS) AS row_count FROM ( SELECT CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ITEMS FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM A INNER JOIN COR_SELF_CHECK_BROKER_ANS B ON A.BROKER_DIVISION = B.BROKER_DIVISION WHERE B.BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND A.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1' AND A.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMM') ) A, ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS READS FROM COR_SELF_CHECK WHERE COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND COR_ENFORCE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMM') ) B
